arts.ttl: Fulham boss Marco Silva fires warning ahead of Man Utd FA Cup reunion
arts.sum: Fulham face Manchester United in the FA Cup, two years on from their trip to Old Trafford when Silva and two players were sent off in a 3-1 defeat - having been 1-0 up

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim makes 'embarrassed' Man United admission with Old Trafford claim
arts.sum: Latest Manchester United news as Ruben Amorim opens up on the challenges he's faced during his time at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Garnacho to buy team dinner for substitution reaction - Amorim
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim says Alejandro Garnacho "will pay for a meal for his team-mates" following his sub reaction against Ipswich.

arts.ttl: Max Dowman is Arsenal's future as teenage sensation bamboozles Manchester United
arts.sum: Brave Gunners on wrong side of result in FA Youth Cup thriller, but 15-year-old midfielder more than justifies the massive hype

arts.ttl: Marco Asensio's Marcus Rashford admission speaks volumes after Man Utd criticism
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford joined Aston Villa on loan from Manchester United for the second half of the Premier League season and has already made an impression with his new team-mates

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim's stubborn refusal shines through with Bruno Fernandes defence
arts.sum: Manchester United face Fulham in the FA Cup fifth round on Sunday, continuing their defence of the trophy won last May, with Ruben Amorim backing his players despite their current Premier League nightmare

arts.ttl: Arsenal 2-3 Manchester United: Red Devils into FA Youth Cup semi-finals after edging Emirates thriller
arts.sum: Max Dowman efforts in vain as young Gunners are narrowly beaten in entertaining last-eight clash

arts.ttl: How problems are stacking up for Ruben Amorim at Man United: A formation that isn't working amid a growing injury crisis, financial issues crippling transfer business... and the first-team star who HAS to be dropped
arts.sum: For Manchester United fans, it already feels like a lifetime ago when Ruben Amorim was appointed head coach and optimism filled the air at Old Trafford. Well, it's only been four months.

arts.ttl: Manchester United unearth rising academy star for Ruben Amorim during FA Youth Cup thriller
arts.sum: Man Utd won 3-2 against Arsenal in the FA Youth Cup quarter-finals on Friday night and Jaydan Kamason was superb.

arts.ttl: Fulham team news: Marco Silva delivers Emile Smith Rowe injury update ahead of FA Cup meeting with Man United
arts.sum: Fulham boss Marco Silva provides an update on Emile Smith Rowe's availability ahead of Sunday's FA Cup fifth-round clash against Manchester United.
